sections.thesis: If long-context inference runs acceptably on an 8GB consumer card, the addressable deployment surface for local models changes shape [intl-zaryad#0]. The published measurement is a 61% memory reduction at under 1% quality loss up to 32k tokens [intl-zaryad#1], and the benchmark reproduces from a single script with no cluster [intl-zaryad#3].
sections.founder: Twenty months of compounding work on one artifact, alone, by one person [intl-zaryad#4]. The trajectory is monotone: prototype kernel, measured autotuning across three GPU SKUs, int8 KV path, 63 dependent repositories at the most recent tag [intl-zaryad#6]. This founder appeared in our system as four separate entities - one Cyrillic form and three romanizations - and was merged on a shared repository URL. Unmerged, each fragment carried a quarter of the evidence and none of them cleared any threshold. That fragmentation is the mechanism by which this profile normally stays invisible.
sections.market: Local and edge inference, buyer-led adoption, no enterprise sales motion. GAP: no revenue, no pricing, no commercial conversations of any kind. The 63 dependent repositories are the only demand evidence and they are usage, not willingness to pay.
risks: No commercial evidence whatsoever. This is a maintainer, not yet a company, and the gap between those is where most of this kind of investment fails.
Single maintainer, two years, no co-founder. Key-person risk is total.
Sole distribution channel is the repository. There is no English-language writing about this work, which is an advantage for us on entry and a disadvantage for the company's hiring and sales later.
Our confidence on the market axis is 0.52 and we are reporting that rather than rounding it up. Three of the six contributing sources required translation.
gaps_flagged: No revenue verification attempted - the company asserts no revenue.
No commercial or pricing evidence exists to evaluate.
Three source documents are not in English. Spans are quoted in the original with translations attached; the original is the evidence.
Institution is recorded as a neutral biographical fact and is excluded from every scoring input. It appears in this file and in no feature.
Entity merge across four name forms is high-confidence but not certain. If the merge is wrong, the founder score is overstated.
sections.recommendation: PROCEED to a first conversation, at the top of this week's list. The technical evidence is stronger than anything else in the current set and the visibility percentile is 0.07 - this founder is not competitively priced because almost nobody else's pipeline can see her. Lead with the commercial question, because that is the only real gap and it is a large one.

recommendation: PROCEED to a first conversation, at the top of this week's list. Strongest technical evidence in the current set, visibility percentile 0.07. Lead with the commercial question.

entity_resolution_notes: Four name forms - Ксения Морозова, Ksenia Morozova, Kseniia Morozova, Xenia Morozova - merged into one entity on a shared repository URL, confidence 0.88. If this merge is wrong, the founder score is overstated and should be recomputed per fragment.
